title: Response Tracking Receipt Schema v1
description: Schema for tracking response status in the autonomous convergence system. Enables read-only inspection of message delivery and processing state.

parent_message_id.description: ID of the parent message this receipt tracks

correlation_id.description: Correlation identifier for tracing message flows

from_lane.description: Source lane that originated the response

response_path.description: Path through lanes that this response has traversed

delivered.description: Whether the response has been delivered

processed.description: Whether the response has been processed

stale.description: Whether this receipt has become stale and should be refreshed

quarantined.description: Whether this receipt has been quarantined due to errors

details.description: Optional additional details about the response state

error_code.description: Optional error code if an error occurred
